specific_location: Private home town in central town of Livermore very near the intersection of Hwy. 287 & W County Rd. 74E
description: Large bird with obvious large decurved blackish bill. Redish orange eyes. Long rounded tail. Wing brown. Median coverts tipped with white, forming two slight wing bars. Sides of neck and head brown. White patch on cheek. Chin and center of throat white with brown submalar stripe. Flanks more cinnamon brown. Other underparts dull buffy white. Some spotting on chest and breast. Dark brown legs.Behaviors: Eating at backyard feederCall: not heardPlumage: adult
photographer: Photographer: Karen Mary Castranova, Karen Mary Castranova, Karen Mary Castranova
